verdict: The chart follows the basic rhythm of the song well, but it contains severe chart-writing errors including impossible 3-panel jumps during holds and extremely awkward single-foot 16th runs.

issues.problem: Requires the player to hit JUMP LR while HOLD U is active, creating an unplayable 3-panel press on a standard Single pad.
Forces a JUMP LR while HOLD D is active, resulting in another physical conflict (3 panels pressed at once).
While holding R, the player must execute a 16th-note L -> D -> U run entirely with the left foot, creating an incredibly unbalanced and difficult one-foot jack.
While holding D, the player is forced to hit U then R as 16th notes, forcing an extremely fast and awkward double-step on the right foot.
The rapid 16th-note sequence U -> D -> L causes highly uncomfortable hip twisting and poor natural foot flow.
